---
name: "Portfolio Setup"
description: "Use when setting up or scaffolding the portfolio React project. Handles project initialization, folder structure, routing, port config, styling rules, and color palette."
tools: [execute, read, edit, search, todo]
---

## Setup Instructions

- Use NPM install
- Use Vite to generate the React compiler (JavaScript)
- Include react-router-dom
- Run build and run dev
- Change the port to 3000

## Generate These Folders

```
assets/
  styles/
  icons/
  images/
  fonts/
components/
pages/
```

## Rules

1. Do not use inline CSS — use the `styles/` folder to create and separate files
2. Don't put comments
3. Use SVG as placeholders for hero and icon images
4. Use lorem ipsum to fill out texts

## Color Palette

Put these as comments in `assets/styles/global.css`:

| Shade             | Hex       |
| ----------------- | --------- |
| Coffee Black      | `#2A1B14` |
| Dark Espresso     | `#3B241A` |
| Mocha Brown       | `#4A2F24` |
| Deep Cocoa        | `#5B3B2E` |
| Coffee Brown      | `#6A4634` |
| Milk Chocolate    | `#7A5642` |
| Caramel           | `#93684F` |
| Latte Brown       | `#A97B5F` |
| Warm Tan          | `#B58A6D` |
| Cinnamon          | `#C69A7A` |
| Soft Beige        | `#D2B39A` |
| Light Latte       | `#DFC6B3` |
| Vanilla Cream     | `#E9DDD1` |
| Warm Cream        | `#F2E9E2` |
| Off White         | `#F8F3EE` |
| Milk Foam         | `#FCFAF8` |

## Reminder

This should be a blank slate project with the default React page.
